ETLDelphi 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Delphi to OMOP CDM ETL: Workflow and Design Decisions
    • How to Run the ETL
    • Oncology Data Diagnostic
    • run_etl: Detailed Steps and Mechanics

Reference

All functions

add_custom_mapping()

Manually add custom concept mappings

analyze_mapping_quality()

Analyze data mapping quality and save results to CSV

default_etl_config()

Default ETL config (schemas, type concept IDs, paths). Used when config is NULL.

exportToParquet()

Export CDM or entire DuckDB database to Parquet files

export_mapping_quality_json()

Export mapping quality metrics as JSON

export_mapping_quality_site()

Export a complete static mapping quality site

export_top_unmapped_source_values()

Export top unmapped source values to CSV

export_unmapped_drugs()

Export unmapped drugs (name, NDC, record counts) for custom mapping

export_unmapped_measurement_values()

Export unmapped categorical measurement values for custom mapping

export_unmapped_units()

Export unmapped units with their measurements to CSV for manual mapping

extract_note_nlp()

Extract structured data from SOAP notes and populate note_nlp

hecate_client()

Create a Hecate API client

hecate_get_concept()

Get a concept by ID from Hecate

hecate_get_relationships()

Get concept relationships from Hecate

hecate_search()

Search OMOP vocabulary concepts via Hecate

improve_mappings()

Improve unmapped concept mappings using an LLM with vocabulary search tools

init_source_data()

Initialize src schema and load Delphi CSV files

init_vocabulary_db()

Initialize a fresh DuckDB database with DDL and load vocabulary files in batches

is_ndc_like()

Test whether a string looks like an NDC code

lookup_ndc_smart()

Smart NDC lookup: try all normalized variants against OMOPHub

ndc_variants()

Generate all plausible NDC formatted variants from a raw string

omophub_client()

Create an OMOPHub API client

omophub_get_by_code()

Look up an OMOP concept by vocabulary and code

omophub_map_codes()

Map source codes to a target vocabulary via OMOPHub

omophub_search()

Search OMOPHub concepts

rebuild_custom_mappings_from_log()

Rebuild custom mapping CSVs from the mapping improvement log

run_etl()

Run the Delphi to OMOP CDM ETL

run_mapping_quality_app()

Launch the interactive mapping quality Shiny app

run_mapping_quality_site()

Serve the static mapping quality dashboard

run_sql_scripts()

Execute SQL scripts in order with logging

split_sql_statements()

Split SQL script into single statements (semicolon-terminated, ignore in strings)

Contents

Developed by Adam Black.
